review_text: Update on 6th april I have not given any update on my claim for more than 2 months, aftwr asking for update I am completely ignored. The reason we get is you claim happened during changing of insurer, this is such a basic hygiene if you are running such business. Older review- Privacy concerns 1. My insurance details were suddenly changed 2. Insurance shows under process but policy exists 3. No updates on insurance claim
don't any one buy this policy if u but u stuck My claim rejected ...no any support. no response from customer care totally bad service
every 2 days the app is showing an updated really pathetic application of people who work in a loop They are so greedy that they even eat reburisment money of maternity. they didn't deserve one star.

Need option for negative ratings also which shows below 0 ratings like -1,-2,-10 loop health is truly an unprofessional and irresponsible app and it's working system poor response at chat support, responding after 30-45 minutes when you initiate the chat request and they are coming for only 3-5 minutes, leaving th chat without responding to our query this shows the irresponsible behaviour of their whole system Claim process is also too lengthy, asking 15-16 documents in separate manner

I love this app. They did my full body check up at a discounted price. I got my reports right away. They also provide you a care plan after your results and you can choose to consult a doctor on the app only. I booked an appointment and got a free consultation on the same day. Everything that costs thousands in normal clinics and hospitals they did do at an affordable price. Thank you loop.
